texto: I journeyed alone for almost ten years before I found home. Adoptions are like very delicate gardening with transplants and grafts. Mine took hold, rooted, and bloomed, even though there were inevitable adjustments to the new soil and climate. Yet I have not forgotten where my roots started.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ashley Rhodes-Courter: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “I journeyed alone for almost ten years before I found home. Adoptions are like very delicate gard…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, coming-of-age, foster-care pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e foster-care.

frase_original: I journeyed alone for almost ten years before I found home. Adoptions are like very delicate gardening with transplants and grafts. Mine took hold, rooted, and bloomed, even though there were inevitable adjustments to the new soil and climate. Yet I have not forgotten where my roots started.
